title: Looker Studio Report
description: Represents a Looker Studio report, which is a customizable dashboard or report asset that connects to data sources and presents data through visualizations. Reports are a subtype of Asset with assetType REPORT.

assetType.description: The asset type, always REPORT for report assets.

name.description: The unique name (ID) of the report. Used as the asset identifier in API calls and Linking API URLs.

title.description: The display title of the report.

description.description: Description of the report providing context about its purpose and contents.

owner.description: The email address of the report owner.

creator.description: The email address of the user who originally created the report.

createTime.description: Timestamp when the report was created, in RFC 3339 format.

updateTime.description: Timestamp when the report was last modified, in RFC 3339 format.

updateByMeTime.description: Timestamp when the report was last modified by the authenticated user, in RFC 3339 format.

lastViewByMeTime.description: Timestamp when the report was last viewed by the authenticated user, in RFC 3339 format.

trashed.description: Indicates whether the report is currently in the trash.
